title: Make CI fail closed — remove all || true security bypasses
objective: Remove all || true bypass patterns from GitHub Actions workflows so that security checks (bandit, safety) fail the build when issues are found. CI must be fail-closed before PRs #27 and #28 can merge.
context: P0-000 triage confirmed: bandit and safety currently use '|| true' so they NEVER fail the build.
Confirmed bypass patterns in CI logs:
Bandit baseline: 21 High + 93 Medium issues already exist — removing || true will make CI red until P0-003 and P0-004 fix the underlying issues.
Strategy: Remove || true BUT add a bandit baseline file (.bandit-baseline.json) so only NEW issues fail the build, not the pre-existing 114 issues.
This allows CI to go green while still catching regressions.
acceptance_checks: bandit exits with code 1 only for issues NOT in the baseline
safety exits with code 1 for any known CVE
Tests still run and produce a report even when they fail
